## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Model/provider adapter
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run build:web`
- [ ] `npm run check:icons`
- [ ] Electron-specific checks, if applicable

## Notes for reviewers

Mention provider docs, screenshots, recordings, migration notes, or known risks.
